hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const ti=(JSON.parse(d).tool_input||{});const paths=[ti.file_path||'',ti.pattern||'',(ti.path||'').toString(),ti.glob||''];if(paths.some(p=>p.toLowerCase().includes('appsettings.local.json')))process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({continue:false,stopReason:'Access to appsettings.local.json is blocked — this file contains local secrets.'}));}catch(e){}});"
